action.reasoning: Observation: best exploration_score=0.6057 (success_rate=0.8733 on full test, room hardest at 0.8, avg successful dist=337.7m; proxy on 9 maps ~0.757). Heuristic improved steadily via alpha tuning + Dijkstra. Analysis: score limited by incomplete success in rooms/tunnels and non-optimal distances; extending to (utility**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) with beta=1.3 lets us prioritize large frontier clusters (high utility) more aggressively while retaining distance penalty - standard refinement in frontier-based exploration. Complete robust predict.py (with beta, full run_evaluation matching contract exactly, per-episode try/except, success-only distance, proxy fallback, coord handling) eliminates any truncation/NameError risks and ensures 0-param compatibility with real ExplorationEnv. Decision: update heuristic params + complete predict.py, run local proxy validation, submit_eval on new checkpoint to measure if exploration_score increases.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
